Minor'S Compromise.
Off Calendar May-24-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
Anthony David, Shaana Rahman and Christopher Dolan, Esq. for Petitioner: Sophia Chen, present as Guardian ad litem for: Gavin Lum, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $1,421,667.00
Medical Expenses $550,139.00
Costs $575,373.00
A net balance of $1,717,821.00 to be paid to a Special Needs Trust for the benefits of the minor.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.
